old_value: {"id":"chai-2oa","title":"Keyed reconciliation silently corrupts DOM when keys are duplicated","description":"`diff_children_keyed` uses `Map[String, (Int, VNode)]`, so duplicate keys overwrite previous entries. This can leave old duplicate-key nodes untracked and never removed, resulting in stale DOM nodes and nondeterministic updates.\n\nFix direction: validate uniqueness of keys in both old and new keyed lists and abort on duplicates with a precise message (`duplicate key: ...`).","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"gbikal@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:13:36Z","created_by":"Bikal Gurung","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:13:36Z"}

{"id":"chai-3zq","title":"Unmounted component handles retain live dispatch closures","description":"When a component slot is removed, `Handle.dispatch` is not invalidated. Parents that keep a handle can still `Cmd::send` into an unmounted child loop, retaining model/queue closures and causing ghost updates + memory retention.\n\nFix direction: track handles per slot and set them to no-op when the slot is removed, or gate dispatch by slot liveness.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"gbikal@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:13:36Z","created_by":"Bikal Gurung","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:13:36Z"}

{"id":"chai-ezb","title":"SPA link helper breaks modified-click/new-tab browser behavior","description":"`link()` always calls `prevent_default()` on click and dispatches `on_nav`. This blocks ctrl/cmd-click, shift-click, middle-click, and other native navigation semantics.\n\nFix direction: intercept only primary unmodified clicks targeting same browsing context; otherwise allow native browser behavior.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"gbikal@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:13:36Z","created_by":"Bikal Gurung","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:13:36Z"}

new_value: Implemented keyed/non-keyed mode-switch fallback replacement in diff_children
Added duplicate-key guards for old/new keyed children in reconciliation
Unmount now invalidates component handles with one-time warning dispatch
link() now intercepts only plain primary same-tab clicks via conditional event dispatch

old_value: {"id":"chai-y6y","title":"Reduce queue copy churn in runtime dispatch loops","description":"`app.boot`, component dispatch loops, and pending init command draining repeatedly call `copy()` + `clear()` on arrays each cycle. Under bursty message loads this adds avoidable allocations and throughput overhead.\n\nFix direction: use double-buffer queue swapping or index-based draining to preserve reentrancy without cloning full arrays each cycle.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"gbikal@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:13:36Z","created_by":"Bikal Gurung","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:13:36Z"}
